title: stachys graveolens
intro: Stachys graveolens, also known as rosemary lemon balm or woundwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys graveolens include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve mental clarity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
